  • Operating Conditions

Operating Conditions#

CellConditions bundles the complete set of operating conditions for one simulation point: current density, stack temperature, and one SideConditions per electrode. It is the main input to set_initial_conditions() and solve():

conditions = CellConditions(
    current_density=np.linspace(1e3, 2e4, 20),   # A/m² — array for vectorised eval
    cell_temperature=353.15,                       # K
    ca=SideConditions(
        inlet_temperature=353.15, outlet_pressure=1.5e5,
        dry_o2_mole_fraction=0.21, inlet_relative_humidity=0.5, stoichiometry=2.0,
    ),
    an=SideConditions(
        inlet_temperature=353.15, outlet_pressure=1.5e5,
        dry_h2_mole_fraction=1.0, inlet_relative_humidity=0.5, stoichiometry=1.5,
    ),
)

All fields in CellConditions and SideConditions that carry physical units accept numpy arrays of the same shape as current_density, so a single solve call evaluates the entire array of operating points in one vectorised pass.

class marapendi.simulation.conditions.CellConditions(current_density, cell_temperature, ca, an)[source]#

Bases: object

Full set of operating conditions for a steady-state cell simulation.

Bundles the current density, stack temperature, and one SideConditions per side into a single object for use with set_initial_conditions() and solve().

Parameters:

  • current_density (float | ndarray)

  • cell_temperature (float | ndarray)

  • ca (SideConditions)

  • an (SideConditions)

current_density#

Current density (A/m²). Can be a scalar or a 1-D array to evaluate the full polarization curve in one vectorised call.

Type:

float or ndarray

cell_temperature#

Stack operating temperature (K). Must be broadcastable with current_density.

Type:

float or ndarray

ca#

Cathode inlet conditions.

Type:

SideConditions

an#

Anode inlet conditions.

Type:

SideConditions

an: SideConditions#
ca: SideConditions#
cell_temperature: float | ndarray#
current_density: float | ndarray#
class marapendi.simulation.conditions.SideConditions(inlet_temperature=353.15, inlet_pressure=None, outlet_pressure=None, dry_o2_mole_fraction=0.2, dry_h2_mole_fraction=0.0, inlet_relative_humidity=0.5, stoichiometry=2, inlet_liquid_saturation=0, inlet_liquid=<factory>, inlet_liquid_flow_rate=0, inlet_gas_flow_rate=0)[source]#

Bases: object

Inlet boundary conditions for one side of the cell (cathode or anode).

Parameters:

  • inlet_temperature (float)

  • inlet_pressure (float)

  • outlet_pressure (float)

  • dry_o2_mole_fraction (float)

  • dry_h2_mole_fraction (float)

  • inlet_relative_humidity (float)

  • stoichiometry (float)

  • inlet_liquid_saturation (float)

  • inlet_liquid (ElectrolyteSolution)

  • inlet_liquid_flow_rate (float)

  • inlet_gas_flow_rate (float)

inlet_temperature#

Gas inlet temperature (K).

Type:

float

inlet_pressure#

Inlet pressure (Pa). Defaults to outlet_pressure when omitted.

Type:

float

outlet_pressure#

Outlet pressure (Pa). Defaults to inlet_pressure when omitted.

Type:

float

dry_o2_mole_fraction#

O₂ mole fraction in the dry gas stream.

Type:

float

dry_h2_mole_fraction#

H₂ mole fraction in the dry gas stream.

Type:

float

inlet_relative_humidity#

Relative humidity at the inlet (0–1).

Type:

float

stoichiometry#

Inlet stoichiometric ratio (actual / required flow).

Type:

float

inlet_liquid_saturation#

Volume fraction of the liquid phase at the inlet.

Type:

float

inlet_liquid#

Liquid phase composition.

Type:

ElectrolyteSolution

inlet_liquid_flow_rate#

Liquid volumetric flow rate at the inlet (m³/s).

Type:

float

inlet_gas_flow_rate#

Gas volumetric flow rate at the inlet (m³/s).

Type:

float

dry_h2_mole_fraction: float = 0.0#
dry_o2_mole_fraction: float = 0.2#
inlet_gas_flow_rate: float = 0#
inlet_liquid: ElectrolyteSolution#
inlet_liquid_flow_rate: float = 0#
inlet_liquid_saturation: float = 0#
inlet_pressure: float = None#
inlet_relative_humidity: float = 0.5#
inlet_temperature: float = 353.15#
outlet_pressure: float = None#
stoichiometry: float = 2#
